rationale: The citing paper references Du and Kamakura (2012) only once, in a grouped parenthetical list of prior multivariate modeling papers. It is used as general background support for the claim that related multivariate models exist in marketing. The citing paper does not discuss that paper's specific SDFA framework, findings, or any direct methodological borrowing from it. Because the citation has no distinct functional role beyond literature listing, this is a mention-only citation.
